scene.title: Cutting Room 7
scene.logline: A filmmaker died mid-edit of her only film. Her cutting room was left as it was. You finish it.
scene.base_prompt: 16mm cutting room, 1974, long vertical light shaft from a high window, dust drifting slowly through the beam, a Steenbeck flatbed film editor on a wooden desk, sleeves of 16mm film hanging from the ceiling, a Royal typewriter with a half-finished page, a cold mug of coffee, a green-illuminated wall intercom, a Bolex on a tripod in the corner with the lens cap off, window onto a grey Pacific coast, everything paused and waiting, cinematic, 24fps, organic grain, anamorphic flare, no people, ambient hum

steenbeck_reels.label: Steenbeck Flatbed
steenbeck_reels.description: 16mm flatbed film editor with two reels and a splice block.

bolex_tripod.label: Bolex on Tripod
bolex_tripod.description: A Bolex H16 on a tripod, lens cap off, pointed across the room.

typewriter_note.label: Royal Typewriter
typewriter_note.description: A Royal typewriter. The carriage is mid-return on an unfinished line.

cold_coffee.label: Cold Coffee
cold_coffee.description: A mug of coffee gone cold. No steam. The ring stain under it says three days.

wall_intercom.label: Wall Intercom
wall_intercom.description: A green-illuminated wall intercom. The only thing in the room that still answers.

light_shaft.label: Light Shaft
light_shaft.description: A long vertical shaft of afternoon light from a high window. The room's grade.

window_ocean.label: Window, Pacific
window_ocean.description: A tall narrow window onto a grey Pacific coast.
